caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a logo, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional microphone and wears a gold chain around his neck. To his left is a white banner featuring five yellow stars and the words "GRIND" and "HUSTLE." The background includes a screen displaying "BOSS" and "KIDOL." Overlaid on the scene are logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Throughout the clip, the man is speaking; in the initial frames, he looks toward the left, and in the final frames, he turns his head to face forward while gesturing with his right hand. The text "CHECK 10" is visible on the front of his black t-shirt.
